memberdef.argsstring: (AccelByte::Settings &InSettings, AccelByte::ServerSettings &InServerSettings, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::IAccelByteDataStorage > LocalDataStorage, AccelByte::FAccelByteTimeManagerPtr TimeManager=nullptr, int32 RegistryIndex=0)
memberdef.name: FAccelByteInstance

briefdescription.para: Obtain an HMAC Buffer encoded MAC Address, using PublisherNamespace as key.

parameterdescription.para: Flag to encode the return value. (default: true)

simplesect.para: Either plain MAC Address or encoded one.
